What We Do

Three Tracks, One Mission

Personalized, practical guidance across career growth, business strategy, and wealth building — designed around your goals.

01

Career & Professional Services

Stand out in a competitive market with a polished professional presence and the confidence to succeed at every stage of your career.

  • Resume Optimization
  • LinkedIn Profile Enhancement
  • Professional Portfolio Development
  • Interview Preparation
02

Business Strategy & Consulting

From startup to scale — actionable strategies grounded in real-world finance and operations experience to drive growth and efficiency.

  • Startup Guidance
  • Small Business Strategy
  • Operations & Process Improvement
  • Decision Support & Problem Solving
03

Investment & Wealth Planning

Build a financial foundation that endures — real estate guidance, investment strategy, and long-term planning to create lasting wealth.

  • Real Estate Guidance
  • Small Business Investment Advice
  • Financial Planning Basics
  • Risk Assessment & Long-Term Planning
About Us

Built on Experience.
Driven by Mission.

We are a small, hands-on team based in New York with real-world backgrounds in finance and business. As a non-profit, every engagement is mission-driven — focused on measurable outcomes, not billable hours.

  • Practicality
    Advice and guidance grounded in real-world finance and business experience — not theory alone.
  • Transparency
    Honest about our capabilities and scope — no overpromising, no generic platitudes.
  • Accessibility
    Services available to individuals and small businesses regardless of their financial resources.
  • Collaboration
    A team-based approach ensuring multiple perspectives inform every recommendation we make.
LaunchPoint Advisory Non-Profit Organization

Who We Serve

Individuals & Small Businesses

Whether you are launching your career or scaling a company, we meet you where you are and work toward where you want to go.

Individuals

Early-to-mid-career professionals, recent graduates, and anyone ready to improve their professional presence, career trajectory, or financial literacy — wherever they are starting from.

Recent Graduates Career Professionals Career Changers Finance Beginners

Small Businesses

Startups seeking strategic direction, established small businesses pursuing growth and efficiency, and entrepreneurs evaluating new investment opportunities with limited access to expensive advisors.

Startups Entrepreneurs Small Business Owners Investors
